testcase.name: test_select_designed_voice_requires_valid_preview

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='agent-campaign-hub.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=30)

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_project_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Test project not found: 405 assert 405 == 200 + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration128_sound_design_agent.py:224: in test_project_exists assert response.status_code == 200, f"Test project not found: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Test project not found: 405 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_project_has_characters
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration128_sound_design_agent.py:232: in test_project_has_characters assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
